# laag

> laag is a TypeScript/JavaScript monorepo library for reading, writing, and manipulating API specification formats. It provides a unified, class-based interface across OpenAPI/Swagger, AWS Smithy, and RAML.

## Packages

- `@laag/openapi` — Read and write OpenAPI 3.0 documents, validate specs, generate JSON samples and code (Python, JS, TS, curl)
- `@laag/smithy` — Parse and manipulate AWS Smithy 2.0 models, generate TypeScript/JavaScript/Python client code
- `@laag/core` — Abstract base class (`LaagBase`) and shared types/errors used by all packages
- `@laag/raml` — RAML support (in development)
- `@laag/cli` — CLI for analyzing API specs (`laag api.yaml`)

## Key Concepts

All packages export a main class that extends `LaagBase`. Construct with a JSON string or object. All return `ValidationResult` from `validate()`.

## @laag/openapi — Openapi class

```typescript
import { Openapi } from '@laag/openapi';

const api = new Openapi(docObjectOrJsonString);

// Read
api.title                          // string | null
api.version                        // string | null
api.servers                        // ServerObject[]
api.getPathNames()                  // string[] sorted
api.getPath('/users')               // PathItemObject
api.operationExists('/users', 'get') // boolean
api.getOperationId('/users', 'post') // string
api.getStatusCodes('/users', 'post') // [{ code, description, media }]
api.getSuccessCode('/users', 'post') // '200' | '201' | ...
api.getOperationData('/users', 'get') // OperationObject
api.getOperationRequest('/users', 'post')      // RequestBodyObject
api.getOperationResponse('/users', 'post', '200') // ResponseObject
api.getOperationRequestMedia('/users', 'post') // string[]
api.getOperationResponseMedia('/users', 'post') // string[]
api.getComponentFromPath('#/components/schemas/User') // resolved component

// Write
api.appendPath('/users', pathItemObject)
api.appendServer({ url: 'https://api.example.com' })
api.setOperationId('/users', 'post', 'createUser')
api.title = 'My API'
api.version = '2.0.0'

// Validate
api.validate() // { valid: boolean, errors: [{ path, message, code }] }

// Serialize
api.getDefinition('js' | 'json' | 'prettyjson')
api.getDocumentAsJson(pretty?: boolean)

// Sample + code generation
api.generateJsonSample('/users', 'post', 'request' | 'response') // sample object
api.getCurlCommands('/users', 'post')    // [{ command, description }]
api.getPythonCode('/users', 'post')      // Python requests code
api.getJavaScriptCode('/users', 'post')  // JS fetch code
api.getTypeScriptCode('/users', 'post')  // TS fetch code with interfaces
```

## @laag/smithy — Smithy class

```typescript
import { Smithy } from '@laag/smithy';

const smithy = new Smithy(modelObjectOrJsonString);
// Throws ParseError or ValidationError on invalid input

smithy.version                      // '2.0'
smithy.metadata                     // Record<string, unknown> | undefined
smithy.shapes                       // Map<ShapeId, Shape>

smithy.getShape('ns#Name')          // Shape | undefined
smithy.getShapesByType('structure') // Shape[]
smithy.hasShape('ns#Name')          // boolean
smithy.addShape('ns#Name', shape)
smithy.removeShape('ns#Name')       // boolean

smithy.getServices()                // ServiceShape[]
smithy.getService('ns#Weather')     // ServiceShape | undefined
smithy.getOperations('ns#Weather')  // OperationShape[]
smithy.getResources('ns#Weather')   // ResourceShape[]
smithy.getHttpBinding('ns#GetOp')   // { method, uri, code? } | undefined

smithy.getTraits('ns#Name')         // Map<string, unknown> | undefined
smithy.hasTrait('ns#Name', 'smithy.api#required') // boolean
smithy.addTrait('ns#Name', 'smithy.api#http', { method: 'GET', uri: '/...' })

smithy.select('structure')          // SelectorMatch[] — supports *, type, [trait|x], [id|namespace = x]
smithy.validate()                   // ValidationResult

smithy.generateTypeScript(options)  // TS interfaces + client classes
smithy.generateJavaScript(options)  // JS classes
smithy.generatePython(options)      // Python dataclasses

smithy.toJSON()                     // SmithyModel object
smithy.toString(pretty?: boolean)   // JSON string
```

## @laag/core — LaagBase, errors, types

```typescript
import { LaagBase, ParseError, ValidationError } from '@laag/core';

// All packages' main classes extend LaagBase:
// - getDocument()          // shallow copy of internal doc
// - getDocumentAsJson()    // JSON string
// - validate()             // abstract — implemented per package
```

## Installation

```bash
npm install @laag/openapi @laag/core
npm install @laag/smithy @laag/core
npm install -g @laag/cli
```

## Source & Docs

- GitHub: https://github.com/bschwarz/laag
- OpenAPI package README: https://github.com/bschwarz/laag/blob/main/packages/openapi/README.md
- Smithy package README: https://github.com/bschwarz/laag/blob/main/packages/smithy/README.md
